title: genista sylvestris var. pungens
intro: Genista sylvestris var. pungens, also known as spiny broom or spiny broom shrub, is a variety of the genista sylvestris plant, which is a type of flowering shrub in the pea family. Traditionally, Genista sylvestris var. pungens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Genista sylvestris var. pungens can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
